he697b3fbg0ffbg4074g837egebf56cc5dd98: Gods, didn't hear you coming. I know I should head home, but I can't bring myself to leave.
h26453d94g80c9g4a67g8887g84587767ec44: The thought of putting him in a wheelbarrow and making the journey all over again... *sigh*
h82e24d07g9ab8g4ed9gbeddgabb4d0fff57b: I found a wand - I think I can resurrect your husband.
h424a1fffg6ffcg48b0gabb1ga6d3806490a1: *You feel a surge of power from the wand - the air suddenly tastes acrid. It wants to be used.*
h50ca5a82g966ag4f24gbf5bg44e9ede09fb1: Bring him back. Bring Connor back - please.
h52630298g3ae6g4efbgb4d0gc77716cffaac: What - what's happening? Why is he still dead?
hb4556d5bg2db0g407eg9ac9g4a20450556e5: *You feel something pull at you. The creature yearns - for a master.*
hcb72dc19g513bg45b0g81aeg0c3f630935a8: What have you done to him?!
hc19830e3g6349g4557ga49dg3c48a5fac479: Huh. The creature's bound to this wand. How useful.
h6b06d9dbg1d8bg44a5gac8fge694d4467d29: He's not a creature! He's my husband.
hf2bb267dg0c5fg49fcga297g5f18a8e9b7e6: I wanted him back - back the way he was. Not this.
h8485c119g75feg460egb5c8g5c911c99d4d4: This is your husband - do you want him or not?
hb5ccecb9gaa48g4868gb372g9cf1e0a79081: I don't even know if he's in there.
h404e8a3cg0266g45ebgb67ag9fbade400757: But he might be. And if he is I'll find him and bring him back.
h5c416660gbbd3g4081gac0cg5f1523d80eb6: Here's the wand. Good luck to you and Connor.
h67d45d21g5439g49c6gbdfag34efe296f9e5: Thanks, but we'll need more than luck. A bloody miracle more like it.
hb26a7d3bgf3d2g4871ga9c5g52e52c99310e: I'll find a wizard or something. Maybe someone in Baldur's Gate can help us.
h2359e0bcgb192g4c87g9ca2gc799556355bc: Connor always said you can find anything in that city. Remember?
hf72579c2g29f2g49e2g80f5g6c875a8ba431: I thought you were going to help! I thought - I thought...
h12f32523g10d6g4866ga03fg5d37d0d6f066: No! You monster! I - I won't let you!
h1fb72a59gc5e7g4c20gb6a2g88741c80bfd1: Don't worry - I have the wand. I'll make use of him.
h2d5efe7eg1589g4295g9646g15a2ecb429c5: We can always bury him again.
h74233a56g2998g4caag88a6ge31e16ef4423: No! Don't put him in the ground!
h0e2366acg98abg4282ga827gb60f3aa1fb08: He was... he is afraid of the dark.
he06b43ecg0d62g4d00gb55bg62bfbda940f0: I'll do it. I'll take him.
h049ecc9cg6cf2g4a23g94dcg026f13e20096: No. The dead should stay dead.
h9954aae8gb3fbg440fg8c60gaca885b62d81: No! I won't let you put him back there.
ha4960940g4153g4ecdgae76g80210e0b06b5: He's all yours - you'll need this wand.
ha82edb54g2d88g4129g8d23gbcf2bd8c1c94: I promised him I'd fix this. And I'm gonna. Maybe - maybe someone in Baldur's Gate can help us.
hdfb64a93ga503g4299g8affg40ebc2e757db: I'll... I'll figure something out. C'mon, love. Let's - let's go.
h081e91f7g2324g4bd8g841dg80a6bf918342: He's already dead. Don't get in my way.
h45c90485g97e1g417eg9e57g6ff0ea928f64: Are you sure you want to do this?
h7240a25eg852ag4486g943cgc466639a62f8: I'm sorry this is how things turned out.
h9b00349cg5770g44d0ga553g1abfc7ed09cf: No. This is my fault. And I'm - I'm gonna fix it.
hdcf00561g7882g497ag8f0cg9d27f956d011: Maybe someone in Baldur's Gate can help us. Connor always said you can find anything in that city.
h0ef8cd38gfafdg4a1egb038g4ace151d4e14: Your husband's gone - this thing is just a monster.
hdab8eabfg3881g4e5dga168g55c6071613f8: You don't know that. He - he could still be in there. And I gotta try.
h7b630976g8f8fg4541g9d4cg0c0309d704e1: Call on your god to smite the undead.
h076c6eacge774g4482gba2cg0896c16bbd81: So the hag fulfils her promise. It can never be simple, can it?
h63161c34g8b71g4457gb39bg29653ac5b9b7: But this isn't what she promised!
ha8185dc3g213fg4cb8gab55g74c88feba939: Hold on - maybe it's not permanent.
ha5ad71edg9b9dg474ag9709g5f8a285d66ba: Not permanent? Bits of him are falling off.
h6b8ed518gbed9g412bgb63dg820fb7c48460: What have you done?! You BASTARD!
h32e1b50fg920cg487ega8b2g446dda75a20f: Not even a little bit. But I will be.
hda48d563g6a89g40f6gb886ge6deec5ef89c: You could just leave him here.
h98aaf30cgef88g4334gabbcg8b6de033a620: No. He deserves a proper burial. He deserves some rest. And he won't get that here.
he52bdd14gc257g4042g9fcege2435016f479: Whining won't get you there any faster.
h38a92a26gb09cg4810gb947ge1e1d2ff1192: You're a miserable bastard, you know that?
hfb690155g0d34g41d3gafedg080ddc6d5a30: We were just kids when we met. Heh. I might have pushed him off a swing I wanted.
h7b253f4egd2dfg48fdg9c50g13bb1e7a6192: He got right up and pushed me back. I was so surprised that I just laughed. He did too.
h46fd86bag75eag4dd8g8bbeg4c834d5eb364: We've barely spent a day apart since.
h0921a62ag5e2fg47f4g9b33g6f1eec1e1210: I could say a prayer, if you'd like.
h98788315g1538g4ca2gbca5g76fd780a2371: Please. Connor used to say only a fool turned down the divine.
h699904fagbd3dg4394g9e0ag93cfcaa0a21f: The weak fall, to make way for the strong - and the Dark One smiles.
h57d997f7g1a1bg4bc7ga64fg7544ecdb8093: A dull life and a dull death, Lord of Murder - barely worth your notice.
h5c7b1c74gf833g4b95gb3efg3aeaedb48e44: Chaff for the Reaper's harvest. May his bleached bones march in your host, great Myrkul.
he7ab2601g0e53g4ebbg9f4eg90078becf6c7: Vermin dies as vermin lived. Good riddance.
hdfb7e421g5d6dg4bfbgaff4gb425a4004e05: You died as you lived - pathetically and without purpose.
hbb01e531gdaa5g469bgacbag485bfb011289: Another reminder of mortal fragilty. I am grateful for this gift.
hadba5087ge72fg442agbfa4g1740b1d24caf: May you dance beneath the boughs - happy and free.
h133cb92egb2aag4b70gb20fgaf7b4325bc31: A beloved husband and father - his vigil is ended, great Guardian.
h97f40f06g5b38g4a62ga040g267dcbdb3bdf: You suffered and endured - may the Broken One shoulder your burdens, that you might walk free.
h956ddfd3g39f2g4752g80c3g3db0458f6b68: You join the same path as all those before - may Kelemvor guide your steps.
hedeb6b57g5474g4c0fgb12ag0bfd077229a3: Light wanes only to wax again - and though life fades, memory shall not.
hf5762341g347dg445bga0a0ga818d97f5f91: Where there is peace, may you have it. Where there is comfort, may those you love know it.
hb983a578gd772g47degbaf4gb641bbd3f5d8: This man's death came too soon. See to it, Wounded Tyr, that he finds some justice beyond the grave.
h12120d31gaeb9g43b2ga159gb1afef1447bd: Gods. Why wasn't it me? Connor...
hce52ccbbg5f9eg481dgbc89g16c5984d1b63: Quietly whisper a blessing for protection. Might Mayrina and her child suffer no harm.
hfb652686gd548g417dg853fgc9295d48d2fa: I miss him. Every moment of every day. Godsdammit.
hc329e1d0g7626g4971gbbf1g02e6eb3b549c: Wife without husband, child without father - Dark Lady, two more know the loss of your embrace.
h51bf887dg9c5cg4640ga7ddgc9055a5ee8c2: I'm sorry. I'm sorry I couldn't bring you  back.
h08863504g4b75g4388gb76dgfa159bb1d37b: Gods, don't creep up on people.
ha6e3b68age345g472dgb535g17113e6def64: I'll be out of your hair soon. I just... can't bring myself to leave.
h80ef3ce3gbaf7g43c1g84d4gfa5ed624cfa7: I can't believe it didn't work. That all of this was for nothing.
h9b3b0864g1b3dg47fagabe1g49b06563cb0b: You said you can resurrect my husband? Bring him back. Bring Connor back. Please.
h335afbabgdc7eg4acagaa1eg79425347cad9: I can't. I don't have the wand anymore.
h82619f0agcf20g477bgaec4ge3fa6173172e: Then why are you even here? Dammit.
